title: centaurea pullata subsp. involucrata
intro: Centaurea pullata subsp. involucrata, also known as the Knapweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea pullata subsp. involucrata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in tea, tincture, and infusion forms to harness its medicinal properties.
